xml.sax.handler/ErrorHandler/warning.name: warning
xml.sax.handler/ErrorHandler/warning.description: Called when the parser presents minor warning information to the application. Parsing is expected to continue when this method returns, and document information will continue to be passed to the application. Raising an exception in this method will cause parsing to end.
